site.title: Julie Zimmerman
site.tagline: WordPress systems, data integrations, and practical problem-solving
site.intro: I work on systems that have to function reliably at scale. WordPress fleets, real estate data pipelines, and AI integrations layered into existing infrastructure. The work is less about tools and more about behavior under load, where systems fail, and how to make them reliable over time.

work_areas.title: WordPress Systems
work_areas.description: Custom plugins, proprietary themes, fleet management across 250+ environments. Built for reliability, not just launch day.

work_areas.title: Data Integrations
work_areas.description: RETS and RESO Web API pipelines, real estate data ingestion, cron-driven sync systems, API connection development.

work_areas.title: System Reliability
work_areas.description: Malware remediation, security hardening, legacy-to-modern migrations, hosting architecture and standards.

work_areas.title: Structured Content
work_areas.description: Custom post types, search and mapping systems, ADA/WCAG compliance, and content architectures built to last.

body: I'm a senior web developer and systems architect based in Billings, Montana, with over 20 years of full-stack experience — from C and Perl on Oracle to modern PHP, JavaScript, and AI-assisted tooling.

My work centers on WordPress systems, data integrations, and the kind of deep structural problems that don't show up in tutorials. I manage a fleet of 250+ active web environments, including high-stakes transactional systems for real estate APIs, cattle auction platforms, and institutional sites.

Before agency work, I was a technical lead at SunGard Higher Education, where I engineered Perl-based synthetic data generators producing over a million randomized student records for enterprise-scale performance testing. That instinct for system-level thinking has stayed with me.

I have a B.S. in Computer Science from Montana State University. I've also spent 12 years as an institutional volunteer photographer at ZooMontana, which directly informed a specialized WordPress CMS framework I built for zoological institutions.
I approach technical problems the same way regardless of scale: understand the system first, then build something that holds.
skills: PHP, JavaScript, SQL/PL/SQL, Perl, Python, HTML/CSS
WordPress — custom plugins, themes, REST API, WooCommerce
RETS, RESO Web API, MLS data integrations
GitHub, Agile, site launch QA protocols

contact.intro: For technical conversations, speaking opportunities, or project inquiries, get in touch directly.
contact.routing_note: Most client project work is handled through Zee Creative.
